formulas.name: First Law of Thermoregulation
formulas.formula: Heat loss = Heat production - Heat storage
formulas.variables: Heat loss, Heat production, Heat storage

formulas.name: Second Law of Thermoregulation
formulas.formula: Heat gain = Heat loss + Heat storage
formulas.variables: Heat gain, Heat loss, Heat storage

formulas.name: Heat Transfer Equation
formulas.variables: Q (Heat transferred), m (Mass), c (Specific heat capacity), ΔT (Temperature change)

formulas.name: Specific Heat Capacity
formulas.variables: c (Specific heat capacity), Q (Heat transferred), m (Mass), ΔT (Temperature change)

formulas.name: Heat Loss through Convection
formulas.variables: Q (Heat transferred), h (Convective heat transfer coefficient), A (Surface area), ΔT (Temperature difference)
formulas.notes: [Used to calculate heat loss through convection]

formulas.name: Heat Loss through Radiation
formulas.variables: Q (Heat transferred), ε (Emissivity), σ (Stefan-Boltzmann constant), A (Surface area), T1 and T2 (Temperatures)
formulas.notes: [Used to calculate heat loss through radiation]

formulas.name: Heat Loss through Evaporation
formulas.variables: Q (Heat transferred), m (Mass of sweat), L (Latent heat of vaporization), h (Heat of vaporization)
formulas.notes: [Used to calculate heat loss through evaporation]
